info.name: Healthcare Management System - Doctor API
info.description: Complete Doctor API collection for Healthcare Management System including profile management, availability scheduling, appointment management, prescription creation, and dashboard analytics

exec: console.log('Doctor registered and token set successfully');

body.raw:
{
  "email": "doctor@example.com",
  "password": "SecurePass@123!",
  "firstName": "Dr. Sarah",
  "lastName": "Smith",
  "phone": "9876543211",
  "role": "doctor",
  "city": "Mumbai",
  "state": "Maharashtra",
  "pincode": "400001",
  "location": {
    "type": "Point",
    "coordinates": [72.8777, 19.0760]
  },
  "specialization": "Cardiology",
  "qualifications": ["MBBS", "MD Cardiology", "Fellowship in Interventional Cardiology"],
  "experience": 10,
  "consultationFee": 500,
  "languages": ["English", "Hindi", "Marathi"],
  "about": "Experienced cardiologist with 10+ years of practice. Specialized in interventional cardiology and heart disease prevention.",
  "licenseNumber": "MH-DOC-12345"
}

request.description: Register a new doctor account. Status will be 'pending' until admin approval. Token will be automatically saved.
Login as doctor. Token will be automatically saved to DOCTOR_TOKEN variable.
Get current doctor profile information including specialization, qualifications, and availability
Update Firebase device token for push notifications about new appointments

item.name: Profile Management

request.description: Update doctor profile information including consultation fee, about section, languages, and qualifications

item.description: Manage doctor profile and professional information

item.name: Availability Management

request.description: Set or update doctor availability schedule for the week. Define time slots for each day with availability status.

item.description: Manage doctor availability and time slots

query.description: Filter by status: all, requested, accepted, on_the_way, in_progress, completed, cancelled

request.description: Get paginated list of all appointments with optional filters. First appointment ID will be saved to APPOINTMENT_ID.
Get all pending appointment requests that need your acceptance
Accept a pending appointment request. Appointment status will change to 'accepted'.

body.raw:
{
  "patient": "{{PATIENT_ID}}",
  "booking": "{{APPOINTMENT_ID}}",
  "diagnosis": "Hypertension (Stage 1) with mild dyslipidemia",
  "medications": [
    {
      "name": "Amlodipine",
      "dosage": "5mg",
      "frequency": "Once daily",
      "duration": "30 days",
      "instructions": "Take after breakfast with water. Do not skip doses."
    },
    {
      "name": "Atorvastatin",
      "dosage": "10mg",
      "frequency": "Once daily at bedtime",
      "duration": "30 days",
      "instructions": "Take at night before sleep. Avoid grapefruit juice."
    },
    {
      "name": "Aspirin",
      "dosage": "75mg",
      "frequency": "Once daily",
      "duration": "30 days",
      "instructions": "Take after dinner to prevent gastric irritation."
    }
  ],
  "tests": [
    "Blood Pressure Monitoring (twice daily)",
    "Lipid Profile (after 30 days)",
    "ECG (if chest pain occurs)"
  ],
  "notes": "Patient advised to:
- Monitor blood pressure twice daily (morning and evening)
- Reduce salt intake to less than 5g per day
- Exercise 30 minutes daily (brisk walking)
- Avoid smoking and alcohol
- Maintain healthy weight (target BMI: 18.5-24.9)
- Follow up after 30 days with lipid profile report
- Report immediately if experiencing chest pain, severe headache, or dizziness",
  "followUpDate": "2025-01-25"
}

request.description: Create a prescription for a patient after consultation. Include diagnosis, medications, tests, and follow-up instructions. Prescription ID will be saved to PRESCRIPTION_ID.
Get doctor dashboard with statistics including total appointments, completed consultations, pending requests, earnings, and patient ratings

variable.description: Doctor access token - set after doctor login
